llmResponse.agenda_changes: Items moved to consent: 14.4 (Approval of Disbursement of Measure U Funds for 2020-21 School Year), 14.5 (Approval of Addendum Disbursement of Measure U Funds for 2019-20, Rocketship Redwood City Prep), 14.8 (Reading and Approval of New Board Policy 4113.5/4213.5/4313.5 - Working Remotely), 14.9 (Approval of Personnel Report), and 14.10 (Approval of Employment Contracts for Superintendent and Deputy Superintendent). Item 14.6 (Approval of School Plan for Student Achievement) was initially recommended for consent but kept as action item.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: And a vote, please. McBride. Aye. Christy Marquez. Aye. Christy Diasoco. Aye. Vice President McAvoy. Aye. President Lawson. Aye.

items.intro_words: Okay. Ready? Yep. Ellie, can we have a roll call
Trustee McBride. Here. Trustee Marquez. Here. Trustee Diaz Ogum
Let's see. Item 4.2. Report out on closed session from earlier this evening
There's item 3.1, the board received information, no action was taken
Let's see. Item 4.2. Report out on closed session from earlier this evening
So welcome, everybody, to our last board meeting of the year, the school year
Do we have any changes to the agenda? Go ahead. Go ahead, Dennis
I'm going to let you guys pipe in as you'd like or I can start being
We go back to our speakers cards. Okay, so we don't have any on oral communication
We can move on to the bond program update. Okay, I'm going to start sharing my screen
Okay. Can you guys see my screen? Okay, great. Dive into construction progress photo update
If there's no more comments or questions, we can move on. Thanks for the update. Will
Item 12.1. Discussion on COVID 19. Thank you, guys. Thanks, Will
And just a reminder, consent Items also include 14.4, 14.5, 14.8, 14.9, and 14.10
Item 14.1, approval of COVID 19, executive order operations, written report
We are on to item 14.2, approval of the 2020-21 proposed budget
Item 14.3, adoption of Resolution 33, funding for preschool programs
Let's see, 14.4 and 5 were moved to consent. 14.6 was recommended for consent
Item 14.7, the new board policy on working remotely. Thank you
Let's see. So we have 14, 8, 9 and 10 went to consent. So we're on 1411
Moving on to board report reports from board members and superintendents
Seeing none from Dennis, I think we can move on to 16 2
Contract update information and credit card summary. Any questions or comments
None. Okay, Correspondence. The name for Adelante Selby. What else
Other business suggested items for future agenda. So go ahead, John
Okay. With that I thought you would be. So this is not an agenda item
Okay. We could get out before 9 o' clock if somebody makes a motion
